prompt: Upload the architecture diagram at ./docs/arch-diagram.png to Confluence page 54321, then update the page body to embed it at 600px width centered.
assertions: Uses confluence.mjs attach 54321 ./docs/arch-diagram.png to upload the file
Uses confluence.mjs get-page 54321 to fetch current page content before updating
Uses confluence.mjs update-page 54321 with body containing ac:image macro
The ac:image tag references ri:attachment with ri:filename matching the uploaded file
Image width is set to 600 (diagram sizing per formatting guide)
